column3:
• Review Milestone 2 requirements (Tasks 7–10).
• Identify data sources (CSV files) and calculation rules (8‑5, grace period, lunch).
• Outline the structure of the combined Java program.
column4: Updated requirements summary; plan for implementation.

column3:
• Implement Task 7: read attendance.csv, calculate daily hours using rules, accumulate totals per employee.
• Implement Task 8: read employees.csv, group hours by cutoff, compute semi‑monthly gross pay.
• Add interactive prompts for employee number and month.
column4: Working Java code for Tasks 7 & 8; tested with sample data.

column3:
• Integrate Task 9: add methods for SSS, PhilHealth, Pag‑IBIG, and withholding tax using official tables.
• Integrate Task 10: read employee_data.txt, parse name and gross salary, compute deductions and net pay.
• Combine all tasks into a single menu‑driven program.
column4: Complete Java program (MotorPHPayrollSystem.java) with all features; CSV and text files.

column3:
• Update the file based on feedback.
• Execute tests (simulate) and record actual results.
• Verify that all calculations match expected values.
column4: Tested and updated code; all functions verified.

column3:
• Update inline comments in code explaining logic.
• Prepare README.md for GitHub repository.
• Review all deliverables for accuracy and completeness.
column4: Well‑commented code; README file; final code ready for submission.

column3:
• Final quality check.
• Upload code, CSV files, text file, and README to GitHub repository.
• Submit repository link to professor.
column4: GitHub repository link; final submission package.

column2: Review Milestone 2 requirements, identify data sources and calculation rules, outline program structure.
Code Task 7 (hours calculation) and Task 8 (semi‑monthly gross) with interactive prompts.
Code Task 9 (deduction methods) and Task 10 (text file processing); integrate into single menu‑driven program.
Incorporate feedback, test all functionalities, verify calculations.
Add inline comments, write README, review all deliverables.
Final quality check, upload to GitHub, submit link.
